kind: legal fresh-virgin-split rerun; frozen 036 recipe (r=32, base_bits=0.4), re-rolled fit + eval

split.fit: CourtListener pairs, both endpoints id%10 not in {3,7}, first 4000 (opinion-disjoint from eval)
split.eval: both endpoints id%10==3 (VIRGIN residue, never scored in 035/036)

read_operator: GO-1 blind margin S=mean g g^T, g=a_hat - cos(a,b) b_hat, refit on fit split, top-r=32
note: Frozen 036 recipe reproduces the flip on a fully virgin opinion-disjoint split. Margin R-O = 0.016 (double 036's 0.008); R (0.7957) edges even the uncompressed AUROC (0.7940) -- nuisance-stripping denoises the ranking. Recon-optimal reconstructs 2.5x better (0.223 vs 0.561) yet loses downstream. Held-out-reuse concern from the U0 statistical audit is closed. Env: /home/claude/env torch 2.10.0+cu128, LaBSE on GPU 1.
